role: Jurist member of the Guardian Council; member, Central Committee for Election Supervision
bio: Mohammad-Hassan Sadeghi Moghaddam is a jurist member of the [Guardian Council](/orgs/guardian-council) and a member of its Central Committee for Election Supervision. He was sanctioned by the US Treasury in February 2020 alongside [Ahmad Jannati](/people/ahmad-jannati), [Siamak Rahpeyk](/people/siamak-rahpeyk), and [Abbas-Ali Kadkhodaei](/people/abbas-ali-kadkhodaei) for preventing free and fair parliamentary elections in Iran.
editorial_notes: Birth year not publicly confirmed. US Treasury sanctioned February 2020.
